sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57864" key="klhmato/desis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλημᾰτό-δεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n57864.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wicker hurdle</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mat</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κλιμακόδεσις</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:36:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
